title: Ways to Give
description: Donations to the U.S. Naval Institute provide funding to mission-centric activities, preserves our history, and creates useful tools to make information and content available when and where we need it. Whether designated for a specific project, such as funding an oral history or creating a digital photo archive, or unrestricted to be used wherever the need is greatest, gifts transform everything the Naval Institute does to remain the independent forum for the Sea Services. We hope you will give a gift and be part of the future of the Naval Institute.
text:
Donations to the U.S. Naval Institute provide funding to mission-centric activities, preserves our history, and creates useful tools to make information and content available when and where we need it. Whether designated for a specific project, such as funding an oral history or creating a digital photo archive, or unrestricted to be used wherever the need is greatest, gifts transform everything the Naval Institute does to remain the independent forum for the Sea Services.
We hope you will give a gift and be part of the future of the Naval Institute.
Appreciated securities (stock) make excellent charitable gifts and may offer special tax benefits to you. Please contact Amanda Ojeda, Development and Grant Manager, at aojeda@usni.org or by phone at (410) 295-1062 and provide your name, the name of the stock to be transferred, the name and contact information of your brokerage firm, and the purpose of your gift. Then give your broker/agent the following information so that your shares may be transferred directly to our account.
Our Broker: Johnson Asset Management
DTC number: 0164
Account number: 2529-7796
Account name: The Naval Institute Foundation
Whether you are just starting your military career, preparing for retirement, or preserving your assets for distribution to the next generation, the planned-giving office can assist you in evaluating the best method of giving for your life stage and circumstances. If you would like to talk with a member of our staff, please contact Amanda Ojeda, Development and Grant Manager, at aojeda@usni.org or by phone at (410) 295-1062.
Information About Making a Planned Gift
The United States Naval Institute is now registered in the AmazonSmile program. When you shop with AmazonSmile and select the Institute as the beneficiary, the AmazonSmile Foundation will donate 0.5% of the price of eligible purchases to the Naval Institute Foundation. There’s no cost to the customer and shopping features are the same as on Amazon.com. While the amount donated by the AmazonSmile Foundation as a result of your purchase is not tax deductible by you, it’s an easy way to support the Institute and its mission.
For more information about the AmazonSmile program, please visit http://smile.amazon.com/about. To register, go to smile.amazon.com, and select the United States Naval Institute as the charity you are supporting.
